prompt: A candid, photorealistic portrait of a young woman with long blonde hair wearing a dark brown leather blazer. She is sitting at a table in a restaurant or wine bar, resting her chin on her hand and looking off to the side with pursed lips. In front of her on the white tablecloth are two glasses: a large glass of red wine and a smaller glass of water. The background features brightly lit, modern shelving filled with rows of wine bottles. Warm, ambient lighting, shot on a smartphone.
